title: Banff & Jasper
summary: 7 days through Canada's most spectacular national parks — Kootenay, Banff, Yoho, and Jasper. Family road trip with accessibility in mind, ending with the Drumheller Badlands.
route: Calgary → Kootenay → Banff → Icefields Parkway → Jasper → Drumheller → Calgary
bookBeforeYouGo: Moraine Lake Shuttle — reservation.pc.gc.ca (April 15 at 8 AM MDT)
highlights: Moraine Lake — Valley of the Ten Peaks
Miette Hot Springs — hottest in the Rockies

accommodation.note: 50–70% cheaper than Jasper, all highlights within 1hr

weather.conditions: Long days, occasional afternoon showers, snow possible at elevation
